CRYOCORE_REPO_URL.description: Public repo URL or operator-controlled clone URL. Credentials must be configured outside git.

CRYOCORE_GIT_REF.description: Pinned branch, tag, or commit to clone.

CRYOCORE_NO_DOWNLOAD.description: Must be set for prep smoke runs.

CRYOCORE_EXECUTION_PROFILE.description: Execution profile selected by the launch manifest.

CRYOCORE_ALLOW_RAW_DOWNLOADS.description: Required for raw-subset profiles. Never set for no-download smoke.

CRYOCORE_OPERATOR_AUTHORIZED.description: Required at runtime for cost-bearing or download-bearing profiles. Do not set in repo manifests as proof of approval.

CRYOCORE_EXECUTION_MODE.description: Use prep only for local dry runs. Real RunPod runs should use real and fail if mock or dry-run evidence appears.

CRYOCORE_STAGE_CONTRACT.description: Optional absolute path to the stage-contract JSON used by the entrypoint.

CRYOCORE_STAGE_PROGRESS.description: Optional absolute path to stage-progress.jsonl. Defaults under /workspace/cryocore/runs/<run-id>.

CRYOCORE_REMOTE_LAUNCH_ALLOWED.description: Required by execution-ready preflight before paid RunPod launch.

CRYOCORE_SUBSET_PROFILE.description: Raw subset profile such as raw_movies_50 or raw_movies_100.

CRYOCORE_ENABLE_CRYOSPARC.description: Enable CryoSPARC gated lane when CRYOSPARC_LICENSE_ID is provided at runtime.

CRYOCORE_ENABLE_PHENIX.description: Enable Phenix gated lane when approved runtime access is provided.

CRYOCORE_ENABLE_CHIMERAX.description: Enable ChimeraX gated lane when approved runtime access is provided.

RUNPOD_VOLUME_ID.description: RunPod-provided network volume id when attached.

RUNPOD_GHCR_REGISTRY_AUTH_ID.description: Runtime reference to provider-side GHCR registry auth. Store in RunPod/provider secrets, not git.

RUNPOD_GHCR_USERNAME.description: Runtime GHCR username only when direct registry auth injection is used.

RUNPOD_GHCR_TOKEN.description: Runtime GHCR token only when direct registry auth injection is used. Never commit real values.

CRYOSPARC_LICENSE_ID.description: Optional license-gated runtime value. Never commit real values.

PHENIX_ACCESS_REF.description: Optional secure reference for Phenix installer/license access.
